cotton.basic_prevention: Use integrated pest management, pheromone traps for bollworm monitoring, field sanitation, and regular leaf underside checks.

rice.basic_prevention: Avoid excess nitrogen, maintain proper spacing, drain excess standing water when pest pressure rises, and monitor weekly.

wheat.basic_prevention: Use clean seed, avoid water stress, inspect leaves for rust spots, and protect crop during flowering.

maize.basic_prevention: Check whorl leaves early, remove heavily damaged plants, use traps where available, and follow local IPM guidance.

soybean.basic_prevention: Use seed treatment, keep fields weed-free early, and monitor leaves and stems from vegetative stage.

chilli.basic_prevention: Use sticky traps, avoid overhead irrigation in humid periods, remove infected fruits, and monitor new leaves.

sugarcane.basic_prevention: Use healthy setts, remove dead hearts, keep proper spacing, and follow local biological control advice.

groundnut.basic_prevention: Keep the field clean, rotate crops, monitor leaves after rainfall, and avoid moisture stress during pegging.
